title: Commerce Park II – Rail Site Receives CSX Select Site Designation
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., March 30, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX (NASDAQ: CSX) today announced that the Commerce Park II – Rail Site in Hopkinsville, Kentucky, has been designated a Platinum CSX Select Site.

title: What Led To A 25% Fall In CSX Stock Since 2021?
text: The recent fall for CSX can be attributed to investor concerns over rising microenvironment risks, elevated costs, a continued rise in interest rates, and a likely recession in the coming months.

title: CSX Signs Deal Related to Paid Sick Leave With IBEW Union
text: The latest deal with International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers, the seventh one between CSX and rail unions, marks CSX's favorable terms with unions.

title: CSX Corp. Announces Date for First Quarter Earnings Release and Earnings Call
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., March 23, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) will release first quarter financial and operating results after the market close on Thursday, April 20, 2023. This will be followed by a conference call and live webcast hosted by the company's management team at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time.

title: CSX Reaches Agreement with IBEW Union on Paid Sick Leave
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., March 22, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX (NASDAQ: CSX) today announced that it has reached an agreement with the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) to provide paid sick leave to employees.

title: Enhanced CSX Carbon Calculator Helps Shippers Achieve Sustainability Goals
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., March 22, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX (NASDAQ: CSX) today announced the launch of an enhanced carbon emissions reduction calculator that will help companies achieve their supply chain sustainability objectives by converting from truck to rail.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain CSX Corporation (CSX) Stock Now
text: Strong liquidity position and pro-investor steps boost CSX Corp (CSX). However, high costs are worrisome.

title: U.S. regulators approve first major railroad merger in more than two decades
text: The first major railroad merger in more than two decades, one that would link the United States, Canada and Mexico, was approved by federal regulators Wednesday.

title: Groundbreaking CSX Select Site Program Adds New Tools, Capabilities to Assist Growing Companies
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., March 15, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX (NASDAQ: CSX) has announced it is enhancing its groundbreaking industrial site selection program to meet growing demand for new rail-served manufacturing facilities. The enhancements will further assist companies in locating properties that meet a wide range of development criteria, including sustainability factors.

title: The 7 Best Infrastructure Stocks to Buy in March
text: Two very powerful forces make infrastructure stocks very attractive at this point. One is the reshoring trend, which refers to American companies building more factories in the U.S. The other is the Bipartisan Infrastructure law, passed in November 2021, but is only starting to have a major impact on companies now.

title: CSX train derails in West Virginia
text: A CSX Corp. CSX, +1.58% train derailed in West Virginia early Wednesday. The empty coal train struck a rockslide in Sandstone, W.

title: CSX Chief Financial Officer to Address JP Morgan Industrials Conference
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., March 08, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Sean Pelkey, will address the 2023 JP Morgan Industrials Conference in New York on Wednesday, March 15, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern time.

title: CSX Investments and Policy Enhancements Drive Multi-year Safety Improvement Trend
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., March 07, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX (NASDAQ: CSX) has achieved record safety performance in recent years through a rigorous and comprehensive approach that includes investments in infrastructure and technology; a growing workforce; fluid network operations; and a safety culture that emphasizes employee training and coaching.

title: CSX Joins FRA Close Call Reporting System
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., March 02, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX (NASDAQ: CSX) today announced that it is joining the Federal Railroad Administration's  Confidential Close Call reporting System (C3Rs) , as part of its commitment to working together to keep its employees and communities safe.
